subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein the Most Great Name calleth out amidst the nations and announceth unto them the glad-tidings of this Manifestation, which when it appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینادی الاسم الاعظم بین الامم و یبشرهم بهذا الظهور الذی اذا ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @knowledge; recognition of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
